commands.review_summary:
The PR adds bounded fallback sanitization for uncloneable diagnostic private data/model-content captures and hardens diagnostics-otel content normalization/tests for unreadable model tool schemas.

PR surface: Source +191, Tests +228. Total +419 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main can drop/abort diagnostic capture when tool definitions fail structuredClone, JSON serialization, String coercion, or property reads; the PR adds focused regression tests for those paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer review for a draft, maintainer-labeled MEMBER PR with no narrow automation repair from this review.

target.title: fix(diagnostics): sanitize uncloneable model content
target.body:
## Summary
- make trusted diagnostic-event listener copies fall back to a bounded sanitizer when `structuredClone` cannot clone captured model content
- keep model-call diagnostic capture from throwing when captured tool definitions fail clone, JSON serialization, and string coercion
- harden diagnostics-otel GenAI content normalization so unreadable tool schema/message fields do not abort span export
- cap fallback diagnostic object walks by depth, array items, and object fields so one uncloneable field cannot turn private diagnostic dispatch into an unbounded copy

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts src/infra/diagnostic-events.test.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts --reporter=verbose --pool=forks --maxWorkers=1 --fileParallelism=false --teardownTimeout=1000` passed 3 shards / 131 tests
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts src/infra/diagnostic-events.ts src/infra/diagnostic-events.test.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts` passed
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts src/infra/diagnostic-events.ts src/infra/diagnostic-events.test.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts` passed
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean after fixing the accepted object-walk budget finding (`overall: patch is correct (0.84)`)
- `blacksmith testbox list --all` blocked: not authenticated
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 5m --ttl 20m --timing-json --shell -- "pwd >/dev/null"` blocked before remote proof: coordinator `POST /v1/runs` and `POST /v1/leases` returned HTTP 401 before any lease id
- agent transcript finder returned `[]`

Behavior addressed: hostile or uncloneable captured model-content/tool-definition data can no longer crash diagnostic dispatch, model-call capture, or diagnostics-otel span export.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw linked gwt on Node through the repo Vitest wrapper; remote Testbox/AWS proof was attempted but blocked by auth/coordinator 401.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts src/infra/diagnostic-events.test.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts --reporter=verbose --pool=forks --maxWorkers=1 --fileParallelism=false --teardownTimeout=1000`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 5m --ttl 20m --timing-json --shell -- "pwd >/dev/null"`.
Evidence after fix: diagnostic dispatcher tests receive sanitized trusted private data, wide uncloneable diagnostic objects truncate after the configured object-field budget, model-call capture emits started/completed events with unserializable tool definitions, and diagnostics-otel exports spans with readable fields plus truncation markers for unreadable schema fields.
Observed result after fix: all focused local tests passed after rebasing on current `origin/main`; format, lint, diff-check, and autoreview are clean.
What was not tested: broad remote `pnpm check:changed` / full repo suite because Blacksmith is unauthenticated and AWS Crabbox coordinator calls return HTTP 401 before lease creation.
